description: Orange printed backpackOne haul padded loop, two padded and adjustable shoulder strapsOne main zip compartment, has three slip pockets, a mesh pocket and pen holdersA zip pocket on the frontTwo mesh stash pockets on one sidesPadded backPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty: 6 months against manufacturing defects
